text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just take a look at the crowd here today at
Chukyo Racecourse—no doubt awaiting the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you can barely find a seat! But just imagine
how much more packed it'd be if Oguri were
running.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Can you imagine if she ran in sprints too? Then
she'd really be unstoppable! She could run every
race by herself. Who needs the others?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So this is it... This is the first stop on the road to
becoming the best sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No way! I'm so excited, I can barely keep myself
from blasting off right here and now!
choice_data_list: That's the Bamboo Memory I know.
That's the Bamboo Memory I know.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! See you in a bit!
